# Disabled Template Workflows

These workflows came from the original FastAPI full-stack template. They are kept here for reference but moved out of `.github/workflows/` so GitHub Actions will not run them.

The active CI workflow for this portfolio project is:

```text
.github/workflows/api-automation-tests.yml
```

It starts the FastAPI application with Docker Compose, checks out the external API automation test suite, runs lint and pytest API tests, and publishes JUnit/Allure artifacts.

## Disabled Workflows

- `add-to-project.yml`: adds issues and pull requests to the original FastAPI GitHub project board.
- `deploy-production.yml`: deploys to a production self-hosted runner using production secrets.
- `deploy-staging.yml`: deploys to a staging self-hosted runner using staging secrets.
- `detect-conflicts.yml`: labels pull requests that have merge conflicts.
- `issue-manager.yml`: manages and auto-closes issues/PRs for the original template repository.
- `labeler.yml`: applies and validates pull request labels.
- `latest-changes.yml`: updates release notes from merged pull requests.
- `playwright.yml`: runs frontend end-to-end tests with Playwright.
- `pre-commit.yml`: runs pre-commit checks and can push formatting changes when configured with secrets.
- `smokeshow.yml`: uploads backend coverage HTML generated by the backend test workflow.
- `test-backend.yml`: runs the template's internal backend unit/integration tests and coverage checks.
- `test-docker-compose.yml`: builds and smoke-tests the full Docker Compose stack.
